title: Role
description: An IAM role that defines a set of permissions for Fastly resources.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the role.

custom.description: Whether this is a custom role.

permissions_count.description: The number of permissions associated with the role.

created_at.description: The date and time the role was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the role was last updated.
